title: Could Kaji and Spike become friends Evangelion X Cowboy Bebop
display_title: Could Kaji and Spike become friends Evangelion X Cowboy Bebop
wikitext:
[]: Could Kaji and Spike become friends? (Evangelion X Cowboy Bebop)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Nov 20, 2021 2:08 pm I've been thinking about something for a while. Could Kaji and Spike become friends? I mean, Spike hated Andy and that's mostly because they were somewhat similar. I can see some of Spike in Kaji and vice versa, even if they're not exact copies of one another. My guess is that neither of them would care about each other. Maybe Spike would hate Kaji, but not the other way around (as Kaji is level-headed).

[]: Re: Could Kaji and Spike become friends?             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Nov 21, 2021 12:23 am Is this Spike Spencer the american voice actor for Shinji? ... Shinji's english voice actor is 53 years old you mean Kōichi Yamadera the voice actor who did both Neon genesis evangelion Kaji and cowboy bebop's Spike but not andy (cowboy bebop) (Masashi Ebara). Both are melancholic and have somewhat of a dead wish, they each loved a single women aswel but that's the end of it really. Both prefer to walk alone and would do this if possible, that said if they are forced to do teamwork they would, both would probably recognize their similarities buth keep it internal. Spike would probably work fasther and harder then Kaji (each episode a new adventure vs 1 adenture) getting frustrated if it doesn't resolve in a timely mater, that said if Kaji provided food and is willing to put up with the rest of the bebop. Spike might actualy relax to much as he looses intrest both valentine and jet would look for something that pays and Spike would occasional help in those endauvers, meanwhile Kaji doesn't need the money nor the exitment.

[]: Re: Could Kaji and Spike become friends?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Nov 21, 2021 11:03 am Yeah, I was talking about Spike Spiegel. I thought this was self explanatory I'm going to update the title of this thread to avoid any further confusions. Anyway, yeah, I agree with you.

[]: Re: Could Kaji and Spike become friends? (Evangelion X Cowboy Bebop)             Quote Post by EvaChero » Mon Nov 22, 2021 10:18 am Spike would just cut to the chase and shoot Gendo, meanwhile Faye Faye would steal and attempt to sync with Unit 1 and then reject instrumentality. She would then reconstruct reality so that the entire earth was covered with casinos. I think Spike's devil may care attitude would appeal to Kaji's youthful memories but in turn Kaji might be able to curb Spikes more capricious tendencies. All in all I think they would make a good duo. Jet Black would spend the whole time face palming and Edward and Ein would move in with Misato, Shinji and Asuka.

[]: Re: Could Kaji and Spike become friends? (Evangelion X Cowboy Bebop)             Quote Post by orcot » Mon Nov 22, 2021 1:18 pm jet, Faye and ed would sightsee a lot of earth, I wonder how Kaji would respond if spike and the rest of the bebop would call earth a paradise compared to their version. Ed would probably call a drug tip, deliver pizzas, etc at all the marduk institutes causing them to be raided and she would read the reports realizing they are all fakes in a afthernoon in stead of the better part of a year they wouldn't really do subtlety, they might hack into Gendo's phonecalls with SEELE if Kaji could get a transmitter in the room, post it online and see if they can get a bounty out of it. The bebop crew would probably set the pace, spike would definitly steal Kaji's sigarets, Faye his wallet, ed would bite Asuka and their would be considerably more neon and jazz into neon genesis evangelion. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P_sQJ4c3eOQ Spike would just cut to the chase and shoot Gendo,
